data.title: Coconut Software introduces 'Meet on Demand' to boost advisor growth by reducing client wait times.
data.description: A recently introduced solution allows financial institutions to cater to a greater number of clients and decrease wait times without the need to hire additional staff. Based in Saskatoon, SK, on Oct. 9, 2025, Coconut Software, a top provider of appointment scheduling, lobby management, and video banking services, is at the forefront of this development.

data.title: REGENXBIO to present interim data from Phase II ALTITUDE trial on sura-vec at AAO 2025. (Numbers: 2025, RGNX, Phase II)
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland on October 9, 2025, REGENXBIO Inc. disclosed plans to share interim findings from the Phase II ALTITUDE® trial investigating the suprachoroidal administration of surabgene lomparvovec (ABBV-RGX-314, sura-vec) in addressing diabetic retinopathy. The company's stock, listed as RGNX on Nasdaq, was involved in the announcement.

data.title: Leaders in biopharma discuss Veeva innovations at Commercial Summit Europe with companies like Astellas, Bayer AG, Moderna; hosted by Veeva Systems.
data.description: Today in Barcelona, Spain, industry leaders convened to discuss the latest AI innovations by Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV). Companies such as Astellas, Bayer AG, Boehringer Ingelheim, LEO Pharma, Moderna, and MSD participated in the exchange of ideas. The event took place on October 9, 2025, with significant players from various sectors engaging in discussions around cutting-edge technologies. Veeva Systems, a leading provider of cloud-based software for life sciences, brought together key stakeholders to explore advancements in AI and collaboration opportunities across industries.

data.title: ProLift Garage Doors in Amarillo hosts 3rd Annual Food Drive supporting FILL WITH HOPE to end student hunger. Event on Sat. from 10AM-2PM.
data.description: In Amarillo, Texas on October 9, 2025, ProLift Garage Doors will hold its 3rd Annual Food Drive for FILL WITH HOPE, a nonprofit aiding hungry students in Canyon ISD. The event is scheduled for Saturday, October 11, from 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m.

data.title: Finzly announces customers are early adopters of SWIFT MX ISO 20022, leading the shift in payment infrastructure.
data.description: Today, Finzly, a renowned provider of contemporary payment infrastructure for financial institutions, revealed that its customers in Charlotte, N.C. are setting the pace by being among the early adopters of SWIFT MX ISO 20022. Specifically, they are ISO 20022-prepared on FX STAR. This is a significant move in the industry as these customers showcase readiness for the modern payment standard.

data.title: ESSA Pharma Inc. completes acquisition by XenoTherapeutics, a significant move in the industry.
data.description: Today, in South San Francisco, California, and Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada, ESSA Pharma Inc. (NASDAQ: EPIX) revealed the successful finalization of XenoTherapeutics' acquisition of ESSA. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for the Company.

data.title: Aircastle's Q2 2025 results: Total revenues $228M, net income $57M, acquired 11 aircraft for $503M, 17% increase in lease rental revenue, 266 unencumbered aircraft net book value $8.4B. STAMFORD, Conn. - Aircastle upgraded to BBB and Baa2 ratings, issued $650M senior notes, 98% debt unsecured, adjusted net debt-to-equity ratio 2.2 times, total liquidity $2.5B. CEO notes profitable growth in fleet, investments, earnings; half fleet NBV in new technology aircraft. Conference call Oct 9, 2025. Aircastle owns 278 aircraft leased to 75 airlines in 46 countries. Balance sheet: total assets $8.88B, liabilities $6.29B.
data.description: Aircastle Limited reported total revenues of $228 million and a net income of $57 million for the three months ending August 31, 2025. They saw a 17% increase in lease rental revenue compared to the previous quarter in 2024, along with an adjusted EBITDA of $262 million. The company acquired 11 aircraft for $503 million, with 50% of their fleet's net book value being made up of new technology aircraft. They also sold 4 aircraft for net proceeds of $73 million. Aircastle had a liquidity of $2.5 billion as of October 1, 2025, with total debt being 98% unsecured. The company owned 270 aircraft with a net book value of $8.4 billion, and managed 8 aircraft with a net book value of $238 million through joint ventures. Their recent upgrades from S&P and Moody's reflect their growing fleet, strong liquidity, and profitable operations. A conference call discussing these results took place on October 9, 2025. Aircastle aims to continue their positive momentum into the second half of their fiscal year.

data.title: Polestar reports 36% retail sales growth in 2025, with 14,192 cars sold in Q3 and 44,482 cars sold in 9 months. CEO optimistic.
data.description: Polestar, a company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol PSNY, reported retail sales of around 14,192 cars in the third quarter of 2025, reflecting a 13% increase compared to the same period in 2024. The total retail sales for the first nine months of 2025 reached approximately 44,482 cars, marking a significant 36% growth year-over-year. Polestar CEO Michael Lohscheller expressed satisfaction with the continued growth trend, highlighting that the company has already achieved sales equal to the entire year of 2024. These positive results were achieved despite facing various external challenges and difficult market conditions.

data.title: Sherman Residential acquires 348-unit luxury apartment complex in Charlotte, NC, renaming it Axis @ The Park.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina - On October 9, 2025, Sherman Residential completed the acquisition of Elan Research Park, a high-quality multifamily structure in Charlotte. Renamed as Axis at the Park, this upscale apartment complex boasts 348 units and was established in 2023. The property holds the name Axis @ The Park and is situated in a prime location in the city.

data.title: Simple Life raises $35M in Series B funding to scale AI health coach for weight loss, led by Hartbeat.
data.description: On October 9, 2025, in London, Simple Life, the AI health coaching app focused on assisting users in weight loss through tailored plans, instant nutritional assessments, and available coaching, revealed a $35 million Series B funding. The investment was spearheaded by Hartbeat.

data.title: ExposeJustice.com is a new platform launched in Philadelphia that offers verified access to court filings detailing due process violations, constitutional breaches, and oversight concerns, aiming to provide transparency into judicial issues.
data.description: A newly launched platform, ExposeJustice.com, is now offering the public verified access to court filings that detail issues such as due process violations, constitutional breaches, and oversight concerns. The platform, launched on October 9, 2025, aims to increase transparency in legal proceedings and make relevant information easily accessible. This initiative provides the public with valuable insights into the judicial system and governmental accountability.

data.title: Fermi America partners with Energy Transfer for natural gas supply to power HyperGrid Campus in Texas.
data.description: In Amarillo, Texas, on October 9, 2025, Fermi America™ announced a partnership with Energy Transfer to establish the world's largest behind-the-meter artificial intelligence private grid campus in collaboration with the Texas Tech University System. This agreement marks a significant step in developing a cutting-edge energy solution. The campus aims to revolutionize energy management by utilizing advanced technologies and fostering innovation. This initiative is set to be a major milestone in the energy sector, showcasing the potential of AI in creating efficient and sustainable solutions.

data.title: Creator Television and World Poker Tour announce first "Creator Poker Championship" with top creators like King Bach and Wengie. Sabio Holdings involved.
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, a unique poker tournament showcases leading personalities such as King Bach and Wengie. This marks Creator Television's debut in the gaming and sports sectors. Transpiring in Toronto on October 9, 2025, Sabio Holdings (TSXV: SBIO) (OTCQB: SABOF), headquartered in Los Angeles, is spearheading this event.

data.title: BOXX Insurance appoints Joe Gates as Head of Distribution, Central, to fuel US expansion. Three key hires announced.
data.description: In Miami on October 9, 2025, BOXX Insurance, a prominent global Insurtech company, revealed three new appointees to bolster its expansion and distribution strategy in the US market. Joe Gates will assume the role of Head of Distribution, Central, tasked with overseeing the heightened interest in the company's services in the region.

data.title: Old Republic International (ORI) to reveal Q3 2025 results on Oct 23, with earnings call at 3:00pm ET. #financials #earnings
data.description: On October 9, 2025, Old Republic International Corporation (NYSE: ORI) revealed plans to release its financial results for the third quarter of 2025 before the market opens on Thursday, October 23. Following this, the company will host a conference call at 3:00 p.m. Eastern time.

data.title: ADCENDO ApS received FDA Fast Track designation for ADCE-D01 targeting uPARAP in soft tissue sarcoma treatment.
data.description: A revolutionary antibody-drug conjugate known as ADCE-D01 has been developed to target uPARAP, an endocytic receptor that is significantly elevated in mesenchymal cancers, including various subtypes of soft tissue sarcoma. This groundbreaking treatment has received Fast Track designation, highlighting its ability to potentially meet the urgent clinical demand in this area.

data.title: Samsung Biologics introduces ExellenS™ for optimized manufacturing, standardizing processes across sites for efficiency and equivalence.
data.description: ExellenS TM is implementing streamlined facility designs, equipment, and processes at all locations to guarantee uniformity and efficiency. By merging operational excellence with core manufacturing skills, ExellenS TM is prioritizing standardization, simplification, and accelerated performance across all sites.

data.title: Halifax Group announced promotion of Jamie Cavanaugh to Managing Director, previously a Principal at the firm.
data.description: In an announcement made on October 9, 2025, Halifax Group revealed the promotion of Jamie Cavanaugh to Managing Director. Previously serving as a Principal at the firm, Cavanaugh will now take on the new role. Halifax Group is a middle market private equity firm that collaborates with management teams to support investment opportunities in top-performing companies. This move signifies a strategic advancement within the company's leadership team and represents Halifax's commitment to driving growth and success.
FERRARI CEO: WE WILL NEVER MAKE A SINGLE MODEL IN LARGE VOLUMES

data.title: Energy Recovery (NASDAQ: ERII) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5, 2025, with conference call at 2pm PT / 5pm ET.
data.description: Energy Recovery, Inc. (NASDAQ: ERII) based in San Leandro, California, will announce its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2025. The company is scheduled to host a conference call on November 5, 2025, following the market close to discuss these results and other related matters. The earnings release is set for Wednesday, November 5, 2025, after the market closes, with the live conference call taking place at 2 p.m. PT / 5 p.m. ET on the same day. To participate in the call, individuals from the US / Canada can dial +1 (8 [phone number]) for a listen-only experience.
